name: madz
description: Your terminal AI companion. Remembers context, runs your skills, and automates workflows.
author: Jason Mulligan <jason.mulligan@avoidwork.com>

scripts.coverage: find tests -name '*.test.js' -print0 | xargs -0 node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=dist/** --test-coverage-exclude=tests/** --test-reporter=spec 2>&1 | grep -A 1000 "start of coverage report" > coverage.txt
scripts.fix: oxlint --fix *.js src tests/unit && oxfmt *.js src tests/unit --write
scripts.lint: oxlint *.js src tests/unit && oxfmt *.js src/*.js tests/unit/*.js --check
